title: Jungle and Swamp Villages
description: This datapack adds the missing and highly wanted Jungle and Swamp villages!
body:
**This datapack adds:**
- Jungle village
- Abandoned Jungle village - variation of normal Jungle villages (2% chance of spawning instead of normal village)
- Swamp village
- Abandoned Swamp village - variation of normal Swamp villages (2% chance of spawning instead of normal village)

**You can locate the villages by typing:**

/locate structure custom_villages:village_jungle

/locate structure custom_villages:village_swamp

It can take anywhere from a few seconds to 1 minute for the command to locate a village, depends on how far the village is from you.


**The style of the villages was made by Grian in 2 of his videos.**
 - https://www.youtube.com/c/Grian - Link to Grian' s channel
